ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cats" (
  "cat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cat */,
  "coat" TEXT /* Type of coat (e.g., tabby, maltese, brown) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the cat (e.g., female, male) */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the cat in years */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the cat in kilograms */,
  "fixed" INTEGER /* Whether the cat has been fixed (spayed or neutered) */,
  "roamer" INTEGER /* Whether the cat is a roamer */,
  "microchip_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the cat's microchip */,
  "vaccinated" INTEGER /* Whether the cat has been vaccinated */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* General health status of the cat */,
  "last_seen_date" TEXT /* The last date the cat was seen */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations about the cat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address where the cat was found */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the cat was found */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the cat was found */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code where the cat was found */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood where the cat was found */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Description of the environment (e.g., residential, industrial, park) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cat_locations" (
  "cat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cat */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the cat was found */,
  "wander_dist" REAL /* Distance the cat wanders from its home location */,
  "last_wander_date" TEXT /* The last date the cat was observed wandering */,
  "wander_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the cat's wandering (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cat_id", "location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, caregiver, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last date the user logged into the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tnr_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the TNR program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the TNR program */,
  "program_status" TEXT /* Current status of the program (e.g., active, completed, planned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cat_tnr" (
  "cat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cat */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the TNR program the cat is part of */,
  "tnr_date" TEXT /* Date the cat was part of the TNR program */,
  "tnr_status" TEXT /* Status of the cat's participation in the TNR program (e.g., spayed, neutered, not yet fixed) */,
  "vet_name" TEXT /* Name of the veterinarian who performed the TNR */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cat_id", "program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the research study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "study_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the research study */,
  "researcher" TEXT /* Name of the primary researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cat_studies" (
  "cat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cat */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research study the cat is part of */,
  "study_date" TEXT /* Date the cat was part of the research study */,
  "study_status" TEXT /* Status of the cat's participation in the study (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cat_id", "study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_results" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research study */,
  "result_name" TEXT /* Name of the result (e.g., population size, wander distance) */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the result */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the result */,
  "result_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the result (e.g., meters, kilograms) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id", "result_name")
)
